paper_title: Pollen and Aerosol Analysis Using Lidar and In Situ Instruments

methods.description: This method converts pollen and aerosol number concentrations to particulate matter (PM) mass concentrations to facilitate comparison with lidar data.

steps.description: Convert pollen number concentration to mass using particle diameter and density.
steps.searchable_summary: convert pollen number concentration to mass using diameter and density

steps.description: Estimate PM10 mass concentration using combined NS and OPS aerosol size distributions.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate PM10 mass concentration from NS and OPS size distributions

methods.description: This method retrieves optical profiles from lidar data using inversion techniques and calibration methods.

steps.description: Apply backward Klett inversion to PollyXT lidar data.
steps.searchable_summary: perform backward Klett inversion on PollyXT lidar data

steps.description: Apply forward Klett inversion to CL61 ceilometer data.
steps.searchable_summary: perform forward Klett inversion on CL61 ceilometer data

steps.description: Post-process Halo Doppler lidar data to correct for bleed-through and calculate attenuated backscatter.
steps.searchable_summary: post-process Halo Doppler lidar data for bleed-through correction and backscatter calculation

methods.description: This method detects the upper boundary of the Boundary Layer (BL) using lidar data.

steps.description: Detect BL top using the derivative of the range-corrected signal at 1064 nm.
steps.searchable_summary: detect BL top using range-corrected signal derivative at 1064 nm
